name: docking-pose-prediction
description: Predict a ligand binding pose: `dock --receptor <entry> --ligand <entry>`. Give --center/--size for a known pocket; without them it boxes the whole receptor (blind docking).
caveats: Specify --center/--size on the known binding site for a meaningful result; the whole-receptor default is only for blind docking.
Vina ignores input partial charges and the preparation is approximate - treat scores as a ranking, not absolute affinities.
Use `score` (single-pose score) when you only want to rank an existing pose; raise --exhaustiveness for harder cases.
body: `inspect` lists open entries and their ids so you can pass the right --receptor/--ligand. Center the box on the pocket centroid; a ~20 Angstrom cube usually covers a site. --modes sets how many poses to return, --seed makes a run reproducible.
